SEQUENCE.COMMENT: pipelineSaveSMTP - note that this is a destructive service - when you call this, the original mime content is lost
this service creates a single pipeline file plus a file for each attachment in the email message, all in the /csutil/logs/pipeline folder
the attachment files take on the form %pipelinename%-mime0.content0, %pipelinename%-mime1.content1, etc
the only way to properly make use of this service is via a subsequent call to pipelineRestoreSMTP
